summary: The diff implements a comprehensive admin product management interface covering REQ-12, REQ-13, and REQ-14. Frontend components (AdminProductForm, ConfirmDialog, AdminProductsPage) are added, the navbar shows a 'Manage Products' link for admin users, React Query mutation hooks are added to useQueries.ts with cache invalidation, and routing is set up in App.tsx. However, the backend CRUD admin-guarded functions are not visible in the diff — only the frontend actor calls are present, with no changes to backend/main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend createProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct functions must be guarded by admin role check and return appropriate errors for unauthorized callers.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo are present in the diff. The frontend calls actor.addProduct, actor.updateProduct, actor.deleteProduct, and actor.isCallerAdmin, but there is no evidence that the backend was modified to add these functions or enforce admin-role guards.
